metadata.description: Collection of Agent Skills for Notifly.

plugins.name: notifly-integration
plugins.description: Integrates Notifly SDK into iOS/Android/Flutter/React Native projects. Use when the user asks to install/setup/integrate Notifly, or when the user types "notifly-integration".

plugins.name: notifly-skill-creator
plugins.description: Creates new Notifly agent skills by researching Notifly SDK + docs via Notifly MCP Server, then generating a complete skill folder (SKILL.md, references, scripts, examples) aligned with this repo's conventions. Only use when the user asks to create a new Notifly skill, or when the user types "notifly-skill-creator".
